title: Warm Yeasty Turkish Peanuts Kisir
description: A light and cozy Turkish dish featuring peanuts, beurre-monte, and a hint of yeast, made with ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients. This kisir is perfect for a warm and comforting snack.
instructions: In a small bowl, combine the warm water and yeast, stirring to dissolve the yeast, and let it sit for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the peanuts, beurre-monte, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the yeast mixture to the peanut mixture and stir until well combined.
Cover the bowl with a cloth and let it sit in a warm place for 10 minutes, allowing the mixture to rise slightly.
Stir the mixture again and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
Serve the kisir warm, straight from the bowl.
Let it cool to room temperature before refrigerating or freezing for later use.
